The '''Coruscant mercenaries''' were a band of [[Human/Legends|Human]], [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]], [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]], and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] active on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], capital of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], during the decade leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
The Coruscant mercenaries, active in [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]] circa [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], were hired by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] to abduct [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], the reigning [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen of Naboo]] during the organization's [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of her [[Naboo/Legends|homeworld]]. In addition to taking the Queen hostage, the assassins were to kill her protectors, two [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].<ref name="TPMvg" />

Planning their attack carefully, the mercenaries split into two teams; the fist team ambushed Queen Amidala and her security captain, [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]], who were to reunite with Senator [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]]. Captain Panaka successfully defended the queen, although she was briefly captured by the mercenaries and assailed by [[hover cannon]]s. Panaka liberated her from her temporary prison in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|undercity]] and prepared to return to the surface with her. However, the [[Sun Guard]] [[Thug leader|leader]] of these mercenaries, who wore a black hooded warrior's uniform and was armed with a [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-ax]], confronted the queen as she was about to leave the Underworld. Captain Panaka skillfully fought this final assassin and killed him with his [[R-65 heavy blaster]].<ref name="TPMvg" />

During this attack, a second team of mercenaries confronted [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] as they escorted [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Defending themselves, the Jedi slew all their assailants and were then escorted to the Temple by [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]].

All of the mercenaries used various lethal methods including a range of hand-to-hand and pistol combat. Others utilized thermal detonators and most of the assassins were killed by the Jedi's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] or by Captain Panaka's variety of blasters.<ref name="TPMvg" />
